checklistName: Post PR223 Main Sync Local Verification Checklist
mainSyncPolicy: after PR #223 merge, switch to main, pull origin main, and confirm clean status before starting the next phase.
localVerificationPolicy: open private-local.html manually and confirm local-only operation remains stable after main sync.
nextPhaseGatePolicy: do not begin the next implementation phase until main sync, clean status, latest log, and local visual confirmation are complete.

mainSyncChecks.label: Switch local repository to main after PR #223 merge.
Pull latest origin/main after PR #223 merge.
Confirm local main is up to date and working tree is clean.
Confirm recent log includes PR #223 merge commit or Phase21-29 files.

localVerificationChecks.label: Open private-local.html manually for local visual confirmation.
Do not create auto update launchers for the local confirmation.
Do not require GitHub Pages for display confirmation.

phase2129PresenceChecks.label: Confirm Phase21-29 builder exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-29 DB exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-29 summary DB exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-29 test exists on main.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not push main directly after pull confirmation.
Do not commit directly to main.
Do not force push or reset main to solve confusion.
Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

privateLocalRules.label: Private repository and local-first operation remain required.
No public release or external delivery is included.

operationPrinciples: Post-merge confirmation is performed on main after pull.
Phase21-29 files must exist on main before starting the next phase.
private-local.html is opened manually; no launcher script is added.
Main direct push, main direct commit, force push, and public delivery remain blocked.
nextRecommendedStep: After confirming main is updated and clean, open private-local.html manually, then proceed only if display is stable.
